title: scutellaria schweinfurthii subsp. schweinfurthii
intro: Scutellaria schweinfurthii subsp. schweinfurthii, also known as the Schweinfurth's skullcap, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Ethiopia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and supporting immune function. Scutellaria schweinfurthii subsp. schweinfurthii can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a popular ingredient in various herbal remedies.
